steps.title: Move from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence says generally that Radiohead chose their name as a tribute to another band. The second sentence gives the precise song and band behind that tribute.

steps.title: Choose the detail transition
steps.content: Choice A signals the last item in a sequence, choice B signals dismissal or contrast, and choice C signals substitution. The needed transition introduces exact details that clarify the general statement. The answer is D.
